title: Microstylis salazarii
taxonomy: Microstylis salazarii is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Microstylis, which contains approximately 20 species of orchids. Microstylis salazarii is native to Asia and is known for its unique and delicate flowers. The classification of Microstylis salazarii is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, phylum Angiospermophyta, and class Liliopsida. This classification reflects the plant's evolutionary relationships and characteristics within the plant kingdom.
